'''Gyr Keela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mrlssi]] who taught at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was known for his beautiful [[Color/Legends|yellow]] and red facial plumage.

==Biography==
Keela became the president of the Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy, a position to which he was promoted after [[Rorax Falken]] suffered a nervous breakdown. He tried to extort money from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] by pretending to have a cloaking device. When the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] also showed interest in the fictitious device, Keela opened negotiations between the New Republic and the remnants of the Empire. During the meeting, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] represented the Republic, while his old nemesis [[Loka Hask]] represented the Empire. An Imperial plot, involving faked video of [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and the imprisonment of Wedge during the negotiations, virtually assured Imperial control of the project. In the end, Keela admitted that the project was a fake. After the Empire was driven off [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]], Keela remained in his position as president, and vowed to reform his ways and restore his people to their former glory.
